expect: Cross-reading reveals 1 actionable synthesis. Produces tool improvement or prescription.
actual: L-1129×L-1183 synthesis: both about selection pressure (too uniform vs too invisible). Dispatch treats recombination candidates as advisory-only (displayed in output but not scored). Fix: wire recombination readiness into UCB1 domain scoring — domains with high-scoring missing-edge partners get +0.2-0.4 boost.
diff: Expected 1 synthesis: got 1 (CONFIRMED). Expected tool improvement: CONFIRMED — concrete dispatch_optimizer.py change identified. Unexpected: the synthesis also connects to L-1130 (recombination methodology) creating a three-lesson triangle.

synthesis.gap_type: Selection pressure operates at two levels that dispatch conflates: (1) symmetry-type matching (L-1129: cheap vs structural fixes), (2) operational visibility (L-1183: tool-cited vs prose-only lessons)
synthesis.tool_change: dispatch_optimizer.py: add recombination_readiness to domain scoring, not just advisory display
